full_text:
Cao Zhang (Ziwen) 曹彰 (子文)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cao Zhang (曹彰), styledZiwen (子文), was born in Pei. Cao Cao’s second son by Empress Bian. Fond of martial arts. Died not long after Cao Cao. Cao Zhang was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Cao Zhang lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
